title: cyclosorus clarkei
intro: Cyclosorus clarkei, also known as the Clarke's fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The Clarke's fern has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make tea or infusions, which are said to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
